headline: Quest Diagnostics Introduces AI Companion to Help Patients Understand and Act on Lab Test Results
summary: Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX), a leader in diagnostic information services, today announced Quest AI Companion, a new AI-powered chat feature that helps individuals analyze, understand and act on their Quest laboratory test results with their healthcare provider.

headline: Quest Diagnostics Inc. (NYSE:DGX) Stands Out as a Sustainable Dividend Stock
summary: Quest Diagnostics (DGX) offers a sustainable 1.63% dividend, backed by a decade of steady growth, strong profitability, and a solid financial foundation for reliable passive income.

headline: Quest Diagnostics Launches Gemini-Powered Quest AI Companion To Analyze Up To 5-Years Of Lab Results In MyQuest App
summary: New feature based on Google's Gemini seamlessly analyzes up to five years of personal lab data to help explain results and uncover potential health risksSECAUCUS, N.J., March 2, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Quest Diagnostics
